title: Tselana ya Boswa go Ralala Diporofense tsa Aforika Borwa
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.eyebrow: Hisitori ya Mophato wa 5 - Legato la Magareng
slides.title: Tselana ya Boswa go Ralala Diporofense tsa Aforika Borwa
slides.lead: A re tsamaye go ralala diporofense tsotlhe tse robongwe re bone mafelo a a kgethegileng, dikgang le ngwao tse e leng tsa rona rotlhe.

media.alt: Mmapa o o mebalabala wa Aforika Borwa o o nang le dintlha tse di tshwaileng mafelo a boswa go ralala naga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amogela barutwana mme o tlhalose kgopolo ya 'tselana ya boswa' - loeto lwa maikutlo lo lo emang mo mafelong a a kgethegileng go ralala Aforika Borwa yotlhe. Botsa: a go na le ope yo o kileng a etela musiamo, kago ya bogologolo, monumente kgotsa lefelo la tlholego? Tselana ya boswa e golaganya mafelo a mmogo. Kwa bokhutlong jwa thuto barutwana ba tshwanetse go kgona go umaka mafelo a boswa mo diporofenseng tse di farologaneng le go bolela gore ke ka ntlha yang re a sireletsa.

slides.title: Boswa ke eng?
slides.lead: Boswa ke sengwe le sengwe se re se ruang go tswa nakong e e fetileng mme re batla go se boloka bokamoso.

blocks.text: **Boswa** ke dilo tse re di bonang mo bathong ba ba tshetseng pele ga rona. E ka nna dilo tse re ka di amang, tse di jaaka dikago tsa bogologolo le didirisiwa, le dilo tse re ka se di amang, tse di jaaka dipina, dikgang, dipuo le ditheo tsa go apaya. Boswa bo re thusa go itse gore re bo mang le gore re tswa kae.

items: **Boswa jwa tlholego** - dithaba tse di kgethegileng, magaga, dinoka le diphologolo.
**Boswa jwa setso** - dikago, dimonumente, botsweretshi le didirisiwa tsa bogologolo.
**Boswa jo bo tshelang** - dipuo, mmino, metantsho, dijo le meletlo.

media.alt: Ditshwantsho tse tharo tse di bonolo: thaba, kago ya bogologolo le moropa, di bontsha mefuta e meraro ya boswa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Naya dikai tse di tlhomameng tsa mofuta mongwe le mongwe gore barutwana ba Mophato wa 5 ba kgone go di akanya: tlholego (Thaba ya Tafole), setso (Union Buildings), jo bo tshelang (go opela isicathamiya, braai ya lelapa, go anela ditlhamane). Gatelela gore boswa jo bo tshelang bo nna mo bathong, e seng mo kagong. Laletsa barutwana go umaka boswa bo le bongwe go tswa mo lelapeng la bone.

slides.eyebrow: Mafelo a lefatshe lotlhe le a sireletsang
slides.title: Mafelo a Boswa jwa Lefatshe a Aforika Borwa
slides.lead: Mangwe a mafelo a rona a kgethegile mo e leng gore lefatshe lotlhe le thusa go a tlhokomela.

blocks.text: **Lefelo la Boswa jwa Lefatshe** ke lefelo le le tlhophilweng ke mokgatlho o o bidiwang **UNESCO** ka gonne le botlhokwa mo bathong botlhe ba lefatshe, e seng naga e le nngwe fela. Aforika Borwa e na le mafelo a a ka nnang a le **lesome** a mofuta o, a anametse go ralala diporofense. Mo tselaneng ya rona re tla etela mangwe a one.

items: Mangwe a tlhophilwe ka ntlha ya tlholego, jaaka dithaba tsa Kapa le Drakensberg.
Mangwe a tlhophilwe ka ntlha ya hisitori, jaaka Mapungubwe le Robben Island.
Go nna mo lenaneng go raya gore lefelo le sireleditswe bana ba bokamoso.

media.alt: Baejini e e kgolokwe e e nang le lefatshe ka fa teng, jaaka letshwao la Boswa jwa Lefatshe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Boloka tlhaloso e le bonolo: UNESCO ke setlhopha sa Ditshaba tse di Kopaneng se se dirang lenane le le kgethegileng la mafelo a botlhokwa go gaisa mo lefatsheng. Ga go tlhokege gore barutwana ba tshware palo e e tletseng ka tlhogo - ntlha ke gore Aforika Borwa e humile mafelo a a ntseng jalo. [SME] Tsweetswee netefatsa palo ya gompieno ya Mafelo a Boswa jwa Lefatshe a UNESCO mo Aforika Borwa (e ne e le lesome ka 2023) pele thuto e phatlalatswa.

slides.title: Boemo bo le bongwe jwa boswa mo porofenseng nngwe le nngwe
slides.lead: Diporofense tse robongwe, mafelo a a tumileng a le robongwe a go a etela mo tselaneng ya rona.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - magaga a a nang le marapo a batho a bogologolo thata a a fetogileng maje (difositlhe).

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - bogosi jwa ntlha jwa Aforika Borwa le tshukudu ya gauta.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - kgolegelo e Nelson Mandela a neng a tshwarelwa mo go yona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Drakensberg - diketekete tsa ditshwantsho tsa matlapa tsa Ba-San.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu le Mthatha - mafelo a bongwaneng jwa ga Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Boswa jwa Ba-San le dikgabiso tsa matlapa tsa bogologolo mo Karoo e e omeletseng.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Metsana ya Basotho le Vredefort Dome e e gaufi.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, kwa go fitlhetsweng logata lwa tlhogo lwa ngwana wa bogologolo.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa tsa Barberton - mangwe a matlapa a bogologolo go gaisa mo lefatsheng.

slides.notes: Se ke selaete sa tshobokanyo. Bala porofense nngwe le nngwe le boemo jwa yona ka lentswe le le kwa godimo, mme o supe fa e ka nnang e le teng mo mmapeng wa maikutlo (kgotsa mmapa wa lebota fa o na le one). Bolelela barutwana gore dislaete tse di latelang di tla lebelela ka bonako mangwe a one. O ka kopa morutwana mongwe le mongwe go tlhopha boemo jo a batlang go bo etela go gaisa mme a bolele gore ke ka ntlha yang. [SME] Netefatsa gore go tsamaisana ga porofense le lefelo go tshwanela klase ya gago; porofense nngwe le nngwe e na le mafelo a mantsi a boswa mme barutabana ba ka nna ba rata dikai tsa selegae.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Setlhopha sa magaga gaufi le Johannesburg kwa borasaense ba fitlhetseng mangwe a marapo a bogologolo go gaisa a lelapa la batho mo lefatsheng.

blocks.text: Kwa **Magageng a Sterkfontein** borasaense ba epile **marapo a a fetogileng maje (difositlhe)** a batho ba bogologolo ba ba neng ba tshela dimilione tsa dingwaga tse di fetileng. Dilo tse di tumileng tse di fitlhetsweng di akaretsa logata lwa tlhogo lo lo bidiwang 'Mrs Ples' le sekeletone se se batlileng se tletse se se bidiwang 'Little Foot'. Ke ka ntlha ya se lefelo le bidiwang *Cradle of Humankind* (Bokgwana jwa Batho).

items: Bokgwana ke fa ngwana a robalang teng - ka jalo se se tshwana le lefelo la matsalo a batho.
Ke Lefelo la Boswa jwa Lefatshe ka gonne le bolela kgang ya batho botlhe.
O sa ntse o ka etela magaga le musiamo le gompieno.

media.alt: Karolwana e e kgaotsweng ya logaga mo tlase ga mmu e e nang le logata lwa tlhogo la difositlhe ka fa teng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa 'difositlhe' sentle: marapo a a fetogileng maje ka iketlo mo sebakeng se se seleele thata. Little Foot le Mrs Ples di dira gore saense e nne ya nnete mo barutwaneng. Boloka kgopolo ya nako e telele e le bonolo - 'bogologolo thata, sebaka se se leele go feta se re ka se akanyang.' Golaganya morago le karata ya selaete 5. [SME] Malatsi a dirilwe motlhofo ka boomo; netefatsa dipalo dipe tse morutabana a tlhophang go di oketsa ka molomo.

slides.title: Bogosi jwa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Bogologolo, mo thoteng e e nang le tlhoa e e papaletseng kwa bokone go ya kgakala, go ne go eme motsemogolo wa bogosi jwa ntlha jwa Aforika Borwa.

blocks.text: Mo e ka nnang dingwaga tse 700 go ya go tse 800 tse di fetileng, **Mapungubwe** e ne e le bogosi jo bo tlhaganeng kwa batho ba neng ba lema, ba tshola dikgomo mme ba gwebisana gauta le lonaka lwa tlou le mafatshe a a kgakala. Kgosi e ne e nna mo godimo ga thota e e kgethegileng. Moragonyana bo-arekioloji ba fitlhetse dilwana tse dintle tsa gauta koo, go akaretsa le **tshukudu e nnye ya gauta**.

items: E bontsha gore magosi a magolo a Aforika a ne a le teng fano bogologolo pele Maeurope a goroga.
Tshukudu ya gauta jaanong ke sesupo se se tumileng sa hisitori ya Aforika Borwa.
Mapungubwe ke Lefelo la Boswa jwa Lefatshe le le mo molelwaneng le Zimbabwe le Botswana.

media.alt: Thota e e nang le tlhoa e e papaletseng e na le sebopego se sennye sa tshukudu ya gauta fa pele ga yona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Selaete se se baakanya tlhamane e e tlwaelegileng ka go bontsha bogosi jwa Aforika jo bo nang le maatla le jo bo humileng jo bo neng bo atlega bogologolo pele ga metlha ya bokoloni. Gatelela kgwebo (gauta le lonaka lwa tlou di tsamaya kgakala ka lewatle) le tshukudu ya gauta jaaka lehumo. Barutwana ba Mophato wa 6 ba ithuta Mapungubwe ka boteng moragonyana, ka jalo o jala peo. Boloka malatsi a le a a kokoantsweng ('mo e ka nnang dingwaga tse 700-800 tse di fetileng').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Setlhaketlhake se sennye mo lewatleng gaufi le Cape Town se se neng sa nna kgolegelo e e tumileng - le sesupo sa kgololosego.

blocks.text: Ka dingwaga tse dintsi **Robben Island** e ne e le kgolegelo. Ka nako ya tlhaolele, baeteledipele ba ba neng ba lwela ditshwanelo tse di lekalekanang ba ne ba tswalelwa fano, kgakala le malapa a bone. **Nelson Mandela** o feditse dingwaga tse dintsi mo seleng se sennye mo setlhaketlhakeng pele a gololwa mme moragonyana a nna moporesitente wa ntlha wa Aforika Borwa yo o tlhophilweng ka temokrasi.

items: Gompieno ke musiamo o o rutang baeti ka ntwa ya kgololosego.
Bangwe ba bakaedi ke bagolegwa ba maloba ba ba abelanang dikgang tsa bone.
E re gakolola go tlotla kgololosego le ditshwanelo tse re nang le tsona gompieno.

media.alt: Setlhaketlhake se sennye se se nang le tora ya lebone mo lewatleng, mme Thaba ya Tafole e le kgakala.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tshwara tlhaolele ka bonya le ka bonolo mo Mophatong wa 5: batho bangwe ba ne ba tshwarwa ka tsela e e sa siamang ka ntlha ya mmala wa letlalo la bone, mme batho ba ba pelokgale ba dira go fetola seo. Tlhalosa Robben Island jaaka lefelo la khutsafalo le tsholofelo ka bobedi. Golaganya le Letsatsi la Kgololosego / Nelson Mandela fa barutwana ba mo itse. Tila dintlha tse di boitshegang; tsepamisa mogopolo mo bopelokgaleng le boleng jwa kgololosego.

slides.title: Botsweretshi jwa Matlapa jwa Drakensberg
slides.lead: Kwa godimo mo dithabeng tsa Drakensberg go na le diketekete tsa ditshwantsho tse di dirilweng ke Ba-San bogologolo.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ke mokgatlho o o kwa godimo go gaisa wa dithaba mo Aforika Borwa. Magaga a yona le marulelo a matlapa a na le diketekete tsa **ditshwantsho tsa matlapa** tse di dirilweng ke batsomi-le-bakgobokanyi ba **Ba-San**. Ba ne ba penta batho, diphofu, le ditumelo tsa bone ba dirisa dipente tsa tlholego tse di tswang mo matlapeng, dimeleng le diphologolong.

items: Leina uKhahlamba le kaya 'lorako lwa marumo' ka Se-Zulu.
Ditshwantsho di na le dingwaga di le makgolo le tota diketekete.
Ke Lefelo la Boswa jwa Lefatshe ka ntlha ya tlholego ya lona le botsweretshi jwa lona jwa bogologolo.

media.alt: Lebota la logaga le le nang le ditshwantsho tsa matlapa tsa Ba-San tsa phofu le setshwantsho sa motho se se tabogang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Tsebisa Ba-San jaaka batho ba ntlha ba Aforika Borwa le bataki ba ba nang le bokgoni le baaneli ba dikgang. Tlhalosa kafa pente e neng e dirwa ka teng go tswa mo didirisiweng tsa tlholego (letsoku, magala, matute a dimela le mafura a diphologolo). Phofu e ne e le phologolo e e botlhokwa thata mo ditumelong tsa Ba-San. Tshwara boswa jwa Ba-San ka tlotlo - ditshwantsho tse ke tse di boitshepo mo baagaming ba losika. Golaganya le dikgabiso tsa matlapa tsa Northern Cape mo selaeteng se se latelang.

slides.title: Go ralala Karoo le Free State
slides.lead: Maemo a mangwe a mararo mo tselaneng ya rona - kwa Eastern Cape, Northern Cape le Free State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Dithota tse ditala kwa Nelson Mandela a godileng teng. Musiamo kwa Mthatha o bolela kgang ya botshelo jwa gagwe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Thota e e khurumetsweng ke dikgabiso tsa matlapa tsa bogologolo, e tlhokometswe ke baagi ba Ba-San le Ba-Khoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Motse wa Basotho
blocks.text: Musiamo o o tshelang kwa o ka bonang matlo a setso a Basotho a a nang le mabota a a pentilweng ka bontle.

media.alt: Diponagalo tse tharo tse dinnye: dithota tse di rolelang, letlapa le le gabilweng, le ntlwana e e kgolokwe e e pentilweng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Maemo a mararo a a atolosa tselana go ya go diporofense tse dingwe le mefuta e mengwe ya boswa: lefelo la matsalo a motho (Eastern Cape), botsweretshi jwa bogologolo (dikgabiso tsa Northern Cape, tse di gabilweng mo letlapeng go na le go pentwa mo go lona), le boswa jo bo tshelang mo motsaneng o o dirang (Free State). Tlhalosa pharologano fa gare ga ditshwantsho tsa matlapa (KZN) le dikgabiso tsa matlapa (Northern Cape). [SME] Emisetsa mafelo a selegae a Eastern Cape kgotsa Free State fa a tshwanela barutwana ba gago botoka.

slides.title: Matlapa a bogologolo le ngwana wa bogologolo
slides.lead: Maemo a rona a bofelo a mabedi a diporofense a ya kwa North West le Mpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ka 1924 logata lwa tlhogo lwa difositlhe lwa ngwana wa bogologolo, 'Taung Child', lo ne lwa fitlhelwa fano. Lo ne lwa thusa lefatshe go ithuta gore batho ba simologile kwa Aforika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa di na le mangwe a matlapa a bogologolo go gaisa mo lefatsheng - a a ka nnang dingwaga di le dimilione tse 3 500 - jaanong ke Lefelo la Boswa jwa Lefatshe.

blocks.heading: Tlaleletso - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park le Constitution Hill kwa bokone di gakologelwa ntwa ya ditshwanelo tsa botho le temokrasi.

media.alt: Logata lwa tlhogo lo lonnye lwa difositlhe fa thoko ga dithaba tsa bogologolo tse di magato.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung e golaganya morago le setlhogo sa Cradle of Humankind - Aforika Borwa e mo bogareng jwa kgang ya matsalo a batho. Barberton e bontsha boswa jwa tlholego jwa mofuta o sele: matlapa a a bogologolo thata. Karata ya tlaleletso e go letla go umaka mafelo a temokrasi a Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Netefatsa ngwaga wa go fitlhelwa ga Taung Child (1924) le dingwaga tse di kokoantsweng tsa letlapa (mo e ka nnang dimilione tse 3 500 tsa dingwaga) fa o di umaka ka molomo.

slides.eyebrow: Boswa jo o ka bo utlwang, bo latswang le go bo bina
slides.title: Boswa jo bo tshelang le Letsatsi la Boswa
slides.lead: Ga se boswa jotlhe jo bo nnang bo didimetse mo musiamong - bongwe jwa bona bo tshela mo go se re se dirang letsatsi le letsatsi.

blocks.text: **Boswa jo bo tshelang** bo fetisediwa go tswa mo bagolwaneng go ya bathong go ya baneng. Bo akaretsa **dipuo tsa rona tsa semmuso tse 11**, dipina le metantsho ya rona, dikgang tsa rona, diaparo tsa rona le dijo tse re di ratang. Ngwaga mongwe le mongwe ka **24 Lwetse** Aforika Borwa e keteka **Letsatsi la Boswa**, fa re tlotla ditso tsotlhe tsa rona tse di farologaneng.

items: Mmino le motantsho jaaka isicathamiya, motantsho wa digumboot le amapiano.
Dijo tse di jaaka bogobe, bunny chow, koeksisters, umngqusho le chakalaka.
Dikgang, maboko a pako (izibongo) le metshameko e e abelanwang gareng ga malapa.

media.alt: Dintlha tsa mmino, moropa le poleiti ya dijo tse di emelang boswa jo bo tshelang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dira gore se e nne selaete se se nang le tirisano thata. Kopa barutwana go abelana pina, dijo kgotsa kgang go tswa mo magaeng a bone. Gatelela gore boswa jo bo tshelang ke jwa mongwe le mongwe mme bo nna bo fetoga - amapiano ke boswa jo bosha jo bo dirwang gone jaanong. Tlhalosa Letsatsi la Boswa ka bonolo: malatsi a boikhutso a phatlalatsa go keteka ditso tsotlhe tsa rona mmogo. Tiisa tlotlo ya dipharologano.

slides.eyebrow: Ke ka ntlha yang go le botlhokwa
slides.title: Go tlhokomela boswa jwa rona
slides.lead: Boswa ke jwa rona rotlhe, ka jalo rotlhe re tshwanetse go thusa go bo sireletsa.

blocks.text: Fa dikago tsa bogologolo di wa, ditshwantsho tsa matlapa di ngwapiwa, kgotsa dikgang di sa tlhole di boelediwa, boswa joo bo latlhega ka bosakhutleng. Ke ka ntlha ya se re nang le **dimusiamo**, **dimonumente** le melao e e sireletsang mafelo a a kgethegileng. Mme batho ba tlwaelo le bone ba a thusa - ka go etela, go ithuta le go fetisetsa se ba se itseng.

items: O se ka wa ama kgotsa wa senya botsweretshi jwa matlapa kgotsa didirisiwa tsa bogologolo.
Etela dimusiamo le mafelo a boswa go ithuta dikgang tsa one.
Reetsa bagolo mme o fetisetse dikgang tsa bone go ba bangwe.

media.alt: Diatla tse pedi di tshwere kago e nnye le setlhare ka bonolo, di bontsha go tlhokomela boswa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlisa thuto go 'ke eng he' ya yona - boswa bo a robega mme bo ka latlhega. Golaganya dikakantsho tse tharo le maitsholo a nnete mo loetong lwa sekolo. Tiisa tlotlo ya mafelo a a boitshepo jaaka botsweretshi jwa matlapa jwa Ba-San. O ka kopa barutwana go umaka selo se le sengwe se ba tla se dirang go sireletsa boswa. Se se baakanyetsa dipotso tsa boeletso.

slides.eyebrow: Bokhutlo jwa tselana - a re boeletseng
slides.title: Se re se ithutileng mo tselaneng
slides.lead: Re tsamaile go ralala diporofense tsotlhe tse robongwe mme ra kopana le boswa jwa tlholego, jwa setso le jo bo tshelang.

blocks.text: Go tswa mo magageng a **Cradle of Humankind** go ya bogosing jwa **Mapungubwe**, kgolegelo ya **Robben Island** le dithaba tse di pentilweng tsa **Drakensberg**, boswa jwa Aforika Borwa bo bolela kgang ya batho ba yona botlhe. Boswa ke jwa mongwe le mongwe, mme mongwe le mongwe a ka thusa go bo sireletsa.

blocks.question: Umaka mafelo a mararo a a farologaneng a boswa mme o bolele gore lengwe le lengwe le mo porofenseng efe.
Tlhalosa pharologano fa gare ga boswa jwa tlholego, boswa jwa setso le boswa jo bo tshelang. Naya sekai se le sengwe sa sengwe le sengwe.
Ke ka ntlha yang go le botlhokwa go tlhokomela boswa jwa rona? Naya mabaka a mabedi.

slides.notes: Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tiro e e kwalwang kgotsa puisano ya klase. Potso 1 e lekola go gakologelwa mafelo le diporofense; potso 2 e lekola kgopolo ya konokono ya mefuta e meraro ya boswa; potso 3 e lekola go tlhaloganya gore ke ka ntlha yang boswa bo le botlhokwa. Kabo ya maduo e latela mokgwa wa Legato la Magareng la CAPS. Konela ka go gakolola barutwana gore le bone ke karolo ya boswa jo bo tshelang jwa Aforika Borwa.
